star_1.text: Simple and fun, but the ads make it unbearable. An ad when you start the game, an ad after every attempt, an ad to keep going, pay walls everywhere. I can't even enjoy the game because of how much ads there are. I would not recommend playing this unless you want about half of your time playing to be wasted on ads, it's genuinely insufferable.

I used to love this game for it's simplicity. $2 to remove ads and get double credits. Now it's ads to continue playing after you lost .... $1 for extra lives or watch a one minute ad for an extra life. The ads went from one 15 second advertisement to two 30-60 second ads. I don't wanna see ad for some shady "live streaming" app when I'm just trying to relax.

The ads literally makes this unplayable for me. I actually uninstalled it within 20 mins. Do yourself a favour and dont waste time with this "game". After you lose each game, the intrusive ad pops up and it just eventually puts you off from playing again. The reason this sucks is because of how frequently the ad takes you away from the game. This is the sort of game where each attempt can be short (depends on if you are good or bad at the game) so if you lose quickly, you get stuck with more ad

Adds Adds Adds Adds. I wish there was a rating lower that one star, you can't even look at the App on your phone and a add pops up. OK, I am exaggerating, but after each turn an add pops up, you just open the app and an add pops up. It's quicker to close and open the app between rounds than watch the 2 million adds 😡

Cheap Advertisement tactics. People like me who paid for complete Ad removal did so because we love to play our games in pristine condition. Putting the ad button right after the gameplay ends will result in accidental clicks and make the point of purchasing the ad free experience redundant. Place the option for Purchasing extra lives and Ads on top of the screen where people who really wish to purchase/view ads can do it consciously and not by accidental clicks. Stop such scummy tactics.

Game uses ads that are ridiculously long and cant be skipped. standard 30s-60s ads are one thing, I but I waited on an ad from Royal Kingdom for what seemed like 5 minutes with no option to skip. Currently, you'll spend more time watching ads than actually playing this game.
Lost all my progress!! Why did you erase all my progress??? I had a lot unlocked and now I don't anymore!! Fix it please!!! also. WATCHING VIDEOS DOES NOT UNLOCK NEW SKINS. FALSE ADVERTISING!!!!!!!
I would rate this game four or five stars, however, they changed the mission layout and got rid of the city which was the one thing that would drive me to play it more than one or two times in a row

The amount of ads in this game make me want to throw my phone out of a window, hoping it hits a sharp rock and the bounce into a bin. It's ridiculous. You get an ad after every game you play (even without WiFi on and airplane mode on) and most of the ads are nothing worth noting down anyway, but yet again, when is any ad. I used to play this game a lot, and there were almost no ads, now the devs have ruined it completely by adding so many ads. Fix the game. I'd say 0/5, but you can't, so...
Barely opened the game for the first and already got an ad that takes me to another game demo that sucks to click out of. Those types of ads are so scummy.

i purchased no ads and still have unskippable ads. this is disappointing and i will be uninstalling this game based on PAYING FOR IT but not getting what i paid for. ridiculous ads every chance they get and they want me to pay AGAIN for no ads

There are so many ads , it also is laggy , glitchy and buggy and it makes me so frustrated , and don't even get me started on the main point of this game, stacking.When I first booted up the game it was fine and smooth then once starting the main game it barely works for me it starts out laggy and glitches and the thing is that the game is still running so when it stops glitching I already lost , PLEASE fix this game.

I like the game well enough (some yet a challenge to get a high score), yet it constantly opens internet ads right on the middle of game play, as if I had pressed on the promotional link, which I never did. I was patient at first, but it kept happening, forcing me to uninstall it. App designers and companies have to learn that even if a game is good, people won't put up with endless ads.

You can't be accurate. I played it for a few hours and I couldn't get perfect score. Than I made a macro and figgled it for an hour or so. And I couldn't make it accurate. The problem is with the game not me...... Higher ups in this company were like. HEY , let's make a game where you need to precise BUT it's you can't be precise and make them piss off by watching annoying ads.
Love this game but sadly having an ad pop whilst playing makes it unplayable.

Usually I don't review stuff but this is just ridiculous. The fact I have to turn off my wifi just so it's playable is ridiculous. The amount of ads in here are probably like 15. it's absolutely insane. Infact some of the time mid game my game lag spikes as it's trying to load an ad. Everytime you lose you see a random ad at somewhere near where you were clicking. If you wanna play this game, it's fun AS LONG as your wifi is off.

I've played this game a long time ago, and enjoyed the simplicity. But it's sad to see the developer has hit a new low, I get that they need money from adds. But my god, I have never seen such sloppy and inconsiderate add placements. They literally have a pop up ads IN THE MIDDLE OF THE GAME. I like the game, I really do....but these desperate adds have made it frustrating to play.

The game idea is very fun and kinda addicting honestly. But ads come up after every game and many times, ads pop up right in the MIDDLE, causing me to lose progress. I thought i was accidentally clicking the add banner but no, my game keeps getting jumped by ads midgame, or directing me to the ads website without warning. Not cool. no matter where i click or how carefully. and I can't get above 30. Why even bother?

HORRIBLE ads placement. I don't really mind ads once in a while, I know that's how you guys made your money, but placing ads in the middle of a playing session? Unbearable. Furthermore, knowing that the game is all about taping the screen continuously, the ad placement disrupts the flow of playing, which is a huge nuisance, and of course you will accidentally click the ad as you tap the screen. I'm uninstalling this app.
Cant even have distinct sounds for the epic skins? Why did the update remove random unlocks and hike the unlock cost? Regret spending money on this.

star_2.text: Hadn't booted this game up in awhile but they re-monetized the app so now there are a whole bunch of "non mandatory" ads buttons. The price for removing ads is no longer worth it. Best just find a different version of this same premise and invest in that app. I purchased Ad-Free for the sleek quick gameplay at least 2 years ago. But now it is just another free to play greed fest. It is on top of lists for Stacker because it use to be legit. Time marches on.

Every time I open the app, I have to reput in my choices of cookies (which is no to everything, which seems to completely confuse the app)and not allow it to access various accounts. Each time I die there's an advert, often more than one, and often the game glitches. Maybe it would work better offline? Other than that, the game is satisfying and I like that you can collect different skins for the blocks

TOO MANY ADS. NOT WORTH. I installed this game for a second time because i remembered it being a lot of fun!! Then I tried to play it. At the end of every 10 second match (im not very good at stacking tbh) there would be an ad. Want to check missions? Ad. Want different stack designs? Ten ads for a random design. Ads, ads, ads. Pay for ad removal you say? Why would I pay for an app that thinks shoving ads down a free users throat is a good idea? I just wanted something quick and calming. And I almost got it.

WAY TOO MANY ADS!! When I open the app there is an ad. Every time at the end of a game, there is an ad. Every time I get an ad, it makes me want to fall off a 10 story building. I played a game with the app, and there was an ad in the middle of the screen!! Remove most of the ads I would give 4 stars if there wasn't many ads, but still, TOO MANY ADS!!
Honestly the game is nice but ads after every round are so stupid. Ridiculous.

This game is a fun, simple relaxation game. But it gets boring after a while, and soon the missions become so hard that they require me to beat my high score to accomplish them, and only for 20 gems each! Plus, they take like 8 hours now for new missions without ads. I like the game, but very poor design...

Great fun. Wished there were no ads but I knew that the studio that made this game Couldnt have helped that. Honestly, it gets frustrating seeing ads every 2 try. Wish there were a version for no adds. !!

The length of ads is terrible. I don't mind watching ads to support devs but come on an ad about a stupid game where I have to click out of it 5 times and if I miss the tiny hit box it loads the sales page? If I say NO I mean NO. I shouldn't have to force close the app to escape over a minute of my time being wasted when someone didn't listen to my no the first time.

I played this some years ago and definetely isn't the same thing anymore - and the change wasn't for the good. It isn't good visually, it has as many colors and a kid cartoon yet they aren't vivid and have nothing to do with the background; I remember we could decide if we wanted a color theme but now is just random. There are challenges now and that's great but I'm not sure I like the time limit thing, most of us are in the game for short breaks. I hate all the ads! Everywhere, every minute.

Fun enough game, difficult where it needs to be yet simple to understand & play through. However, while it has ads after every game like you expect, what I CAN'T stand is ads that pop up AS YOU PLAY THE GAME. I find the best strategy focuses on speed & getting a rhythm going, & being redirected to a site I have no interest in ruins my streak & kills my enjoyment of the app. Fix that, then I'll happily give this a 5/5.

Good game to kill the time. great phyics. aesthetically pleasing. Runs smoothly all the time. Way too many ads. The time is split evenly between playing and advertisement which is a shame as it completely destroys the experience. sometimes an ad pops up while you're in the middle of the game making you accidentally click on it, which is even worse.

It would be a higher rating but the issue I am having is everytime I play the game its an ad and when I click or exit put of the ad the sound goes away??? I like to hear effects and sounds when I play games and if I don't I'm playing music in the background then but other than that I'd like to hear the effects in the background of the game, the game is very fun to play :)) again, I just wanna hear sounds thank you!!

Game is cool, but the adds are terrible. There is an add after every try, and most of them you can't close out for 20 to 30 secounds. I was trying to listen to an audio book, but the adds kept interrupting it, even with the sound on the game turned off. Good game, but if the adds where silent that would be nice.

I have to turn my phone onto airplane mode to play this game. The second my phone gets a sniff of internet connection, I'm bombarded by ads that interrupt my game, and for something as sensitive and timing based, that's not on. The lag I also get from the adverts loading makes gameplay impossible, because of these bugs, I haven't been able to get past 20 layers before it bugs out

Always found this game a good way to kill time but literally after every round I'm subjected to an ad and they cut off music or any other external media I might be listening to. An ad after every loss is not necessary at all. I would rate higher because it's a fine game that runs smoothly it's the ads that affect the possibility

The game itself is good but the sheer amount of advertising makes it difficult to get in to the game. I had an ad pop up full screen in the middle of a round yesterday! I wouldn't pay for the upgrade because I can't tell how much I can get in to the game. If you eased up just a little on the ads, people would probably play more- they'd end up seeing the same number of ads anyway, they just wouldn't be so annoyed about it.

I mean it's not the worst but it's also not good. Plus the ads are annoying. You play it for like 5 minutes and that's it. You've got everything you can from the game. The sound design and visuals are pretty nice but that's because there are so few sounds and visuals to code. The idea of earning tiny silhouettes of buildings for as achievements is a nice one but it's very shallow and can be easily added on.

The game itself has been nice, and missions added to it. Unfortunately quite recently the advertisements have gotten out of forepaw. The small ones at the bottom of the screen were alright, but now at end of every game there is an obnoxious, video advertisement with sound forced on. Unfortunately hard to recommend any more.

The Ads are just beyond awful. Game is 4 stars. Simple but a time burner. It would even be tranquil and meditative. But literally between every single 30-45 second round is an ad that forces watch for 5 seconds and then shows a summer after that ad with a delayed "x". And you frequently won't hit the "x" properly and then end up opening the garbage that is being advertised. I do not recommend this game based on the obtrusive advertisements.

This game does not save game data through Google play games. I got a new phone, and even though Google Play Games shows me at level 21, when I launch the app, it puts me back at 0. I had to uninstall and reinstall the app due to glitches when watching ads for rewards. Every time I'd close the ad, my screen would just black out and I wouldn't receive my reward. I'm mad because I'd already purchased all the different stacks for the game and had over 4000 "diamonds" in my bank.

star_3.text: This game is fun and well made, but the amount of ads are annoying. I initially downloaded this as a mind number to help me sleep, but two ads pop up after every one or two tries of stacking the blocks. I wouldn't mind the ads if it was after maybe every 4 or 5 tries... but two? Anyway, it's a pretty good game other than that, and there is a no ad version, so if you like it you can get that.

For anyone upset about the ads,all you have to do is turn on airplane mode before opening the app and it'll stop all ads, or you can turn off your data and wifi. Just remember to turn it back on and check your phone calls and texts every so often in case someone is trying to reach you. I'm giving 2 stars because the ads pop up a rediculous amount, and during a game,the adspop up and mess you up. I shouldn't have to turn off my data/ wifi, or turn on airplane mode to have a good gaming experience

The overall gameplay and app itself was amazing a few years ago, but recently it has started to go downhill a bit. Certain textures for the blocks don't work correctly anymore, and some adds are not properly moderated so they send you to scam / virus sights. If you are looking for something fun to play on a lang car ride, or while waiting for food at a restaurant, this will help pass the time, but if you are looking to play it competitively with friends, it's way to buggy for that.
The game is a bit boring and every time you die you get an ad, If you removed the super annoying ads that would be a 5 star.

This game is fun but THE ADVERTS ARE RIDICULOUS. I don't normally leave reviews but I thought I would here. This game has been going for a while. I remember playing it when I was a kid, I don't remember it having this many ads. Ads every time you die and sometimes even mid-game which completely throws you off! And ads along the bottom. It makes this game infuriating. Sort it out.

This game is fun for a while, but it was laggy & can be laggy. After playing for some time, it becomes boring & repetitive. The ads are quite annoying as well eventhough I understand the dev needs income. But it's every finish to a game, so I feel it's disruptive. I do love the game, but the ads are a no for me & I would love to download other games so i'm uninstalling this. I also like that there are targets, etc. 3 Stars.

The app itself is pretty fun, but there are a few issues I have that ruin the experience. Issue 1: It's one thing having an add between plays, but to have the add strip at the bottom of the screen during play time is a little silly. It make the game perform badly with lag that makes the game almost un-enjoyble. Issue number two: after you unlock all the skins, there is zero replay value. Its a shame the more exotic skins don't have different exotic musical scales when you do a perfect stack.
It's boring when you play it a lot but when you first play it is actually kinda fun! 3 stars! thank you!!!! :)
love the game but the offline wont work. when i try it offline like turning my wifi off it just stays on the loading screen, please fix.

the game itself is super fun and distracting, BUT WHY on EARTH would you have ads pop up as I'm in the middle of playing a round?? I don't mind ads after the round is over, but when it's the middle of it that sucks because then I'm going to click on it accidentally and then get taken to whatever the ad was, and I pretty much lost that round. is there any way you guys can keep the ads to only after rounds?

The game's good, but there are things to fix, and NEEDED to be fixed fast. Like, sometimes when you stack, it delayed the stack (stacks 1 second after you click) and there are too many ads. Being forced to watch ads everytime you lose is just crazy. Overall the game is nice and fun to play. But, please remove some ads and fix the problem.

This game is really really average. The gameplay is somewhat fun and addictive yet feels lacklustre at the same time. The thing I like is that any ages can play, sometimes I let my 4yo sister play and she handles it fine. The ads can get quite annoying at points which feels unnecessary. OK game to try but gets a bit boring after a while.

Great game, but there are too many ads. I don't necessarily mind ads, but it's ridiculous. I get an ad after basically every playthrough. I get an ad as soon as I open the app. You already have the option to watch ads to unlock certain parts of the game. Isn't that enough?

Even when I set the game and my phone on silent, the ads somehow override this setting and sounds played loudly. Ads are difficult to exit out of and I often need to restart the app in order to play a new game. More often than not, clicking the exit button will open my browser directing me to a page to buy the advertised product. I enjoy the game, but the ads are out of control and ruin the experience.

This game is... Good. The game can get difficult after at least... I don't know... 18? The art style is nice but it does get repetitive after at least 5 games. And that's it really. That's most of if not all of stack! Maybe ads are annoying but they feel regularly put. Not too many which is good. But not so little that it should have a price tag on it. That's why my final rating is two towers and a plane / 10

This game is fun and a great way to waste time. The only problems I have with the game is the ads. I get an ad every time I open the game and after every one or two rounds. On both my phone and my tablet, when I'm playing, it'll randomly take me to a shady website, out of nowhere and it'll mess up the entire round. I'm about to uninstall, as fun as it is, I don't want a virus on any of my devices.

The score I give is because of the ads mostly, and then because it's not real challenging, as to there's nothing to move up to or advamce too, it's the same old same old. Although the game is fun and it pushes away time. It could be so much bettwr with some effort from the makers...

It's a great and relaxing game with lots of skins to customise the blocks and very satisfying when the blocks stack on each other. BUT, there is lots of adds! Like seriously? After every turn, THERE Is always an add. You would be very lucky if you didn't get ONE add after every turn!

A pretty nice casual game to play from time to time but the interruptions make it harder so usually it would be better to turn off your wifi before attempting to get a high score, the game always lags at the start and the sudden pop up ads at the bottom screen will distract you and make your gameplay delayed for a few seconds

It's a good app I like the sounds they've added but there's ads everywhere! It also is somewhat laggy, when I was in the middle of stacking it would exit the game and send me back to play store for no reason. I have found a hack that makes this app alot more enjoyable however, turn off your Wi-Fi and you won't have an ad problem until you turn it back on.

star_4.text: Stack is a simple time killer game about continuously stacking one block on another as perfectly as possible. Blocks can have different skins, which keeps the game from being visually boring, and the simplicity makes it addictive and perfect for killing time. My issues with this game are the amount of ads and how expensive the different skins are. Every time you reach a certain score threshold, it will play an ad after you die, no matter what. Skins cost in game currency that is slow to get.

Probably the only game more frustrating than the original flappy bird. No matter what, every game they will throw in a huge slowdown mid 70s and it's impossible to predict after the rapid speedup from 40-65. I can only play it once or twice at a time before wanting to throw my phone through a window. Otherwise not bad. For everyone complaining about ads, you're on android. Lookup private dns in your settings and put an ad guard there. Also, the pink gold skin doesn't show the blocks.

Great and fun game but 1 problem, the adds pop up while playing the game and the game dosent pause and some adds dont have the "X" to close so im tapping the screen to make it disappear but it dosent and I end up loosing the game because of the adds ans the fact for some reason it doesn't pause. please fix.

This game is underrated. It's a very easy-going game made for when you have time to kill. I like how the art style is a mix of modern and retro. The only problem is the ads, because you have to pay to get rid of them (I mean, that IS how they make money). But other than that, I recommend playing this game.
The game is good and great It's just that since you updated and removed the towers we built, the game has become kind of pointless Can you bring this part back Thanks
This game is pretty fun but it has so many adds. Not too many to say it's bad but it's kinda annoying. Still I would definitely recommend this app for everyone!

It's a great game there is not many faults but I would like to bring them to your attention, no.1 on missions the wait time is to long, to have to wait an hour is to much, I would suggest bringing down at least to half an hour. No.2 it's dull, there is nicer ways to say it and better ways to say it, it's addicting but even a bit of good music that is in rhythm with the game would be good. No.3 I find that 20 points for completing a mission is to little, getting to a hundred points is hard and to be rewarded with only 20 (the things u use to buy textures with) is not enough. Thanks and keep up the work.
MORE SKINS PLEASE!!! LOVE these quick mindless games. The color changing formula plus the octave changes are so satisfying! The new missions and skins are perfect too!!

Very nice game,it can keep me entertained for HOURS! Only 4 stars, because after a while, it starts speeding up like crazy!I'm unable to beat my high score because of that, but otherwise, the game is great, and I don't even need to pay that much attention to the game so I can just focus on my thoughts while I'm keeping myself entertained! If I could, I would most definitely give it 4.5 stars, but since I can do that, I will give it 4! Highly recommend! Also if the ads bother u, turn ur wifi off!

This game kept me and my sister occupied for a VERY long time. It was super fun trying to see who could get more, and who could beat the high score. The reason why I rated it a 4/5 is because it can get frustrating at times, and it is kinda hard. Also, THE ADDS AFTER EVERY GAME!? Anyway, overall it's a fun game and I would recommended it people who are more on the patient side😊

This game is pretty good. It's better up for a while and it is a very good game. Although when trying to watch a video or an ad for coins, it does not allow you to ever skip the video which I find an issue because I have to close the app every single time and it does not allow me to get the coins

Good game, but the ads wouldnt have been an issue if it doesnt freezed the game even if it was for few milliseconds. This throw off entire coordination of the players. Okay with ads, but something need to be done for this lagging problem
whenever i forget to update the game, the game randomly freezes when im playing.. like can you please not make it freeze.

Ketchapp u have to keep making games! I love all the games u make I download them as soon as I can I love this game I play it when I'm bored it's a really fun time passing game its challenging and I rage sometimes but I don't think games would be that fun without rageing. I recommend this game for everyone don't listen to the haters if u have too many ads turn your internet off. U should checkout Ketchapps other games there're really fun 4/5 cause graphics could be better but really fun game. 🌟

I like playing the game and it's very relaxing. The only thing I don't like is that after you open all of the stacks it gets a little boaring all you can do is play to get a higher score and do a couple of missions so you get more diamonds. I have over three thousand diamonds but there is nothing to use them for. I really wish you would give us some more tiles to open maybe some different shapes like round or heart maybe a star shape anything would be better than nothing. I would give a 5 stars.

I love how you can just go on and on forever. I love how it's just so entertaining to kill time. I didn't have any problems with the app until about 5~6 days after I installed the app, it started lagging and kicking me out of the game sometimes. When I re-installed the game it worked again for the next 5~6 Days. But that often happens with free apps. But the other thing is, I don't complain about ADS much. But there's literally TOO many ADS! But if those things Can be fixed, I'd give a 5 star.

This was absolutely perfect at first, but the only issue I have now is that it lags sometimes, which is definitely not good, especially for a game like this. I've noticed that the lagging might be associated with the ad at the bottom of the screen? Idk, but it seems to lag whenever the ad changes or moves, idk if anything can be done about that.

The game is Very colorful and addicting. When you land a platforms over and over again the piano pitch gets higher and higher. You can add music to the background if you want but with out it, it's not that bad. The only problem with the game is the amount of adds in it. They give you a add like every 2 tries.,But it's still a good game!

I love this game! I want to know an answer that I am curious about. It's silly but yet I still want to know and can't get an accurate answer to. How many block colors does this game have? It would be amazing if the player could create their own colors and designs for the blocks. It would be interesting and fun. I think more colors and more creativity and use in the game would make it so fun and creative. It could also add to your score depending on the colors you obtain and use during the game!

This game is amazing and crazy addicting. I like how you can just keep on going forever and strive to get a higher score! One thing that is a bit annoying though is the ad at the bottom of the screen. It makes the game lag sometimes and ruins the gameplay at times. I would recommend excluding this ad.

star_5.text: Best game ever, you'd think it would be boring but it isn't, in the beginning you only have to wait 5 minutes for the missions but now its a hour :( , if you have a problem with ads, TURN YOUR WIFI OFF, then they can't load :) It glitched the first time and I thought just waited 10 minutes for a game to download and it not work at all, but now it works smoothly, its relaxing, time killer, and I would totally reccommend to ANYONE, hope you enjoy, GO DOWNLOAD

It's a very simple and addictive game, I actually got a bunch or my friends into playing it. Having obtained every skin in the game, it would be kinda nice to see a v2.0 of the game, since right now it's quite repetitive and all you can do is build to your next skin or try to get a high score. I simply play offline to avoid ads so i can't give feedback on that, but everything else about the game is good.

The game itself is simple and fun. It seems very responsive to me... I'm sure your mileage may vary, but it seems programmed well. And the aesthetics are very nice to look at, which is important for a game like this. My one issue *was* the ads. Honestly, for a free game, it's not even bad, but I was gonna give it -1 star for no option to pay to remove ads. I'm glad I double checked because there's a big ol' button on the main screen I missed, and it's less than $2. Fantastic game! Full marks.

I've had this game on all my phones for years now. I love it! It is a great stress reliever, and sometimes I start it only intending to only play a few minutes, finding myself two hours later still at it, lol. I only wish they would release more designs. I get all of them and end up uninstalling it and reinstalling so I can work at getting them again, lol. other than that, no grips. 😅 I do think it would be fun to have tournament matches or something with other players though. (^_^)v

its perfect for if you have stress!! I had stress but once I tried it I loved it and I was relived! Its great to relax yourself too. For example if you've had an awful day because of someone just click on download!

I love this game,no joke, it is ad free, no need of network, it is so cool, it is lit, it's very challenging,but I like it,definitely worth playing it, it is a good time killer, if I were you I would have already downloaded it, it is so time killing that when I want started playing it hours go by, like until my mother tell me to get of my phone I wouldn't stop playing it, it is so fun try it right now, by the way thanks for this game who created, it is so good, amazing game ,definitely worth it.
I love this game it's a good game for all ages because it teaches people something and that's to never give up and keep trying because that's how people become successful and a patient person.
Very satisfying and simple. A perfect example of what a mobile game should be. Nothing bogged down with extra features or pay walls that make the game unplayable. Its simple and enjoyable.
I think this game is really fun but the game is only for kids that don't crash out on losing a game

This is a great game I've only been playing five minutes and I already love this game.yes it has ads but not to many that it disturbs the game play. The idea is very simple stack up as many blocks as possible without losing any parts. See what your high score in the end is. The ads are only 5 seconds maybe 10 but it's so good. Highly recommend the game to others.
there are some ads but they're short and the actual game is worth the 5 second wait

Love it. I use this when I have panic attacks or feeling anxious. Sounds are amazing and satisfying. No leaderbord, no money, no levels. Just a satisfying stack. Yes, there are advertisements. But it's playable. Just turn on airplane mode, these developers have to make money somehow. Ignore the "too many adds" comments, there are adds, but it doesn't interrupt mid game or in your fa ce.

It's super fun. I play it for when I'm bored or when me and my friends don't know what to do and it's super fun screaming on each other to not brake the cube. And I like the music it's nice and the noise when the cube brakes. I also like the colors. It's a relaxing game but at the same time tense game because you are trying to beat your high score without braking it to a slither or not even making it on the other cube. 10/10 stars 😁

Hi all, I just wanted to tell everyone complaining about ads to download Blokada. You can get the paid version from play store (sorry Apple users) pr download the free version from online using APK. Without ads, this game is absolutely perfect. I actually bought the paid version (no ads) just to support the developers because this game is perfect in its simplicity. Highly recommend (after paying for it or getting adblockers)

SUPPORT THIS DEV, I DID! Great On my S21+ Fun, absorbing! Ads not intrusive. It's amazing it's so fun and doesn't require wifi, so it's perfect for a long car ride. And the ad amount is balanced, so don't change that. Because when I play it, it is a nice game that your really need to focus on or you lose your hard work but the annoying thing is that if you have a really high score, and you don't focus you lose your score and your start back at 0 so that is really really annoying and the adss!!!! simple game. had it and played it for a long time. relaxing at first until your average score starts to progressively go up. then it becomes daunting.. living every day to beat the lask stack.. :) but it definitely worth the addiction that comes with hitting the install button. crisp yet simple graphics, few ads. nothing unbearable.. if youre ad-impatient remember the time of cable tv and continual commercials.. its humbling to remember its 7 seconds not 5 mins worth of ads.

Love it 😊 But...is it possible to put extra levels on, or more patterns, or something to keep me engaged. I find it so therapeutic but want more! Can you set more "target goals", or just add on anything?!! I don't mind the Ads, cos the game is so good for de-stressing, but I would love there to be extras added if possible. Thanks Hels 😊

I love this game 💛.It helps me de-stress and focus . And it also helps if u can't go to sleep at night. Also there is only about two adds a day. I have only played this game for two day I love it. I recommend this game . ☺️💛 especially if u are stressed/bored/need to relax/not able to sleep. ☺️✨
